## Subdomain Registration

**Subdomain:** `<your-subdomain>.ispinoy.dev`

### Checklist

- [ ] Filename matches the subdomain (e.g. `yourname.json`)
- [ ] `subdomain` field in JSON matches the filename
- [ ] `owner.github` matches my GitHub username
- [ ] At least one valid record (`CNAME`, `A`, or `TXT`)
- [ ] CNAME value ends with a trailing dot (e.g. `yoursite.vercel.app.`)
- [ ] The subdomain points to something real and active
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
